Setlist
Original Song Debuts
This is a list of all original songs that have been performed live and/or released officially. We have omitted certain "non-songs," such as improv jams, the interludes from Before These Crowded Streets, bkdkddkdd, etc. Conversely, we have included some jams that we believe to be more than mere improvisation, such as Richmond Jam.

Songs are sorted by their "Overall Debut" date. If that column is blank, the overall debut date is the studio release. It's also worth noting that there are many missing shows/setlists from the band's first few years, so some debuts could actually have been earlier than we have listed here.

If a song had been teased, partially played, or interpolated into another song prior to its formal debut, we have noted that in the "Notes" column. We have also noted a few songs that had been soundchecked more than a year prior to their debut.
# Song   Overall Debut Debut Personnel   Studio Release   DMB Debut   D&T Debut   Dave solo Debut Notes
